decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 8/10 sessions consistent. Session 2 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 6 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 83/3490 lines reworked (2.4%, 24/50). 0/33 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 6.2% (3/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 36. Session 8: 34 (process:20 efficiency:11 ttfw:3). Session 9: 42 (process:20 efficiency:15 ttfw:7). Session 10: 45 (process:20 efficiency:18 ttfw:7). Session 11: 32 (process:20 efficiency:10 ttfw:2). Session 12: 29 (process:20 efficiency:7 ttfw:2).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 256/256 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Only one adapter implements an interface. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
